<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Submit STC Pay OTP"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/b/checkout/api/sdk/v1/stcpay/pay/"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



 
            The Capture endpoint is responsible for processing capture requests to STC pay.
            It accepts the session ID and OTP (One-Time Password) as input parameters.
            The endpoint performs a capture request to STC pay
            and handles the transaction state based on the response from the payment gateway.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>

</Heading>
